name: Agar Wood Oil (Copper/Tamra) 5 GM
description: Sacred Agarwood oil infused with copper-resonant energy. Known as Aguru in Sanskrit, revered in Ayurvedic and Hindu traditions for purification and spiritual elevation.

name: Agar Wood Oil (Divine) 5 GM
description: The supreme divine Agarwood oil, crafted for profound spiritual elevation and meditative depth. Mentioned in the Atharva Veda for its purification properties.

name: Agar Wood Oil (Gold/Suvarna) 5 GM
description: Rare Agarwood oil harmonized with golden frequencies for attracting prosperity, enlightenment and royal energy. A prized offering in Vedic temples.

name: Agar Wood Oil (Silver/Rajata) 5 GM
description: Sacred Agarwood oil attuned to silver (Rajata) energy — for cooling the mind, amplifying lunar consciousness, and deep meditation.

name: Champak Oil (Champaka Taila)
description: Extracted from the sacred Champaka flower, beloved by Lord Vishnu. This oil carries a rich floral-sweet fragrance and is used in temple offerings and aromatherapy.

name: Gulab Oil (Pink Rose) 3 ML
description: Precious pink rose essential oil (Gulab Taila) — one of the most sacred fragrances in Vedic ritual. Uplifts emotions and calms the nervous system.

name: Gulab Oil (Red Rose) 3 ML
description: Deep red rose oil of divine potency. Used in Ayurvedic stress relief, heart chakra balancing, and sacred rituals.

name: Holy Basil (Tulsi) Essential Oil
description: Liquid divinity of Vishnu — Tulsi oil purifies the space, boosts immunity, calms the mind and is a cornerstone of Ayurvedic wellness.

name: Jasmine Oil (Mallika Taila) 3 ML
description: The moonlit nectar of the Gods — Jasmine oil (Mallika Taila) enhances romantic energy, reduces anxiety, and brings a divine floral peace.

name: Kadamba Oil (Mitragyna parvifolia) 3 ML
description: Extracted from the sacred Kadamba tree — associated with Lord Krishna's divine pastimes. An earthy, sweet, sacred oil for spiritual connection.

name: Kewda (Pandanus odoratissimus) 3 ML
description: Kewda, the rare pandanus blossom oil of South India, is used in sacred worship offerings. Its intense floral sweetness is unparalleled in Indian perfumery.

name: Pink Lotus Oil (Padma Taila) 3 ML
description: Blossom of Enlightenment — Pink Lotus oil awakens spiritual consciousness, heart-opening and deep emotional healing.

name: Rajanighandha Oil 3ML
description: Moonlit elixir of divine fragrance — Rajanighandha (tuberose) oil has deep calming properties and is revered in Indian floral perfumery.

name: Sandal Wood Oil 5 GM
description: The Divine Fragrance of Enlightenment — Pure Indian sandalwood oil (Chandana Taila), the most sacred of all oils used in prayer, meditation and Ayurvedic practice.

name: Vetiver Root Oil (Ushira Taila) 5 ML
description: The Earth's Cooling Veins — Vetiver root oil calms the nervous system, cools excess Pitta, and grounds scattered energy through its rich earthy aroma.

name: White Champaka Oil (Sveta Champaka Taila) 3ML
description: Celestial Moonlight Essence — White Champaka is the rarest form of Champaka flower. Its divine oil purifies space and elevates meditative states.

name: White Lotus Oil (Pundarika Taila) 3ML
description: Nectar of Divine Purity — White Lotus oil (Pundarika Taila) embodies the highest spiritual awakening and is sacred to Goddess Saraswati.

name: CHINTAMANI (King of all the Rasamani)
description: The Wish-Fulfilling Gem — the supreme, most powerful Rasamani in existence. Crafted through ancient alchemical processes of Rasa Shastra to manifest all desires and bring divine blessings.

name: Gnana Rasa (Silver)
description: The Silver Knowledge Gem — crafted to enhance wisdom, knowledge, and intellectual clarity through the power of sacred alchemy.

name: Rasa Mani (Divine Elixir Gem)
description: Crafted from purified mercury and infused with rare high-vibrational elements, the Divine Elixir Gem restores balance, vitality and spiritual awakening. Deepens meditation and amplifies manifestation.

name: Ashvakarna Resin
description: Pure Ashvakarna Resin, highly valued in Ayurveda for its aromatic and medicinal properties. Used in incense, ritual offerings and herbal preparations.

name: Rala Dhoopa
description: Traditional Rala Dhoopa (aromatic resin incense) for spiritual elevation, space purification, and air cleansing. Used in Vedic rituals.

name: Yaksha Dhoopa
description: Sacred Yaksha Dhoopa resin incense — burned in temples and homes for divine protection, spiritual clarity and to attract auspicious energies.

name: Sandal Wood 100 GM
description: Pure Indian Sandalwood chips — for burning as incense, making pastes for devotional purposes, and use in traditional Ayurvedic formulations.

name: Raw Wild Honey
description: 100% pure raw wild-harvested honey from the forests of Devarayanadurga. Rich in enzymes, antioxidants and medicinal properties as described in Ayurveda.

name: Wild Stingless Bees Honey
description: Rarest of all honeys — collected from wild stingless bee colonies. Prized in Ayurveda (Mehi) for its extraordinary medicinal properties and bittersweet taste.

name: Hanuman Chalisa Palm Leaf Manuscript (Sanskrit and English)
description: The sacred Hanuman Chalisa inscribed on a beautifully preserved palm leaf in both Sanskrit and English. A rare collectible of original artistry inspired by ancient traditions.

name: Palm Leaf Engraving (Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy)
description: Exquisite continuous-line palm leaf engraving of Lord Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy, crafted using ancient techniques passed down through generations.

name: Natural Navaratna Stone Set
description: 100% pure, ethically sourced Navaratna stone set representing the nine celestial bodies. Used for protecting the main door and welcoming divine energy into the home.
